notes: The transcription incorrectly identifies the S-recension (Sinaiticus) text of Tobit as part of the apparatus. On this page, the upper block of text is the B-recension (Vaticanus) and the lower, indented block is the S-recension. Both are part of the main body. The actual apparatus is the section at the very bottom of the page. Corrections for the S-recension have been categorized as 'BODY' to reflect the correct structure of the page.
